title: OREGON HEALTH PLAN COMMUNITY PARTNER - 211info
text: URBAN LEAGUE OF PORTLAND OREGON HEALTH PLAN COMMUNITY PARTNER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Supports under-served communities with health coverage, including enrollment assistance, plan selection, and follow-up for public (Oregon Health Plan) and private insurance. Guides clients through the application process and promotes equitable access to health insurance for African American Oregonians. Confidential Address Eligibility: Unrestricted, with a focus on the African American community Hours: Hours vary Email (503) 280-2600 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 280-2600 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Multnomah County Services: Navigator Programs * African American Community Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - ADVOCACY AND CIVIC ENGAGEMENT COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - SENIOR INFORMATION AND ASSISTANCE EMPLOYMENT - WORKFORCE DEVELOPMENT HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - COMMUNITY HEALTH LEGAL SERVICES - FAIR HOUSING ENFORCEMENT COLLABORATIVE SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - YOUTH PROGRAMS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. URBAN LEAGUE OF PORTLAND
